uxAuditReport.description: Structured UX audit report documenting findings, fixes applied, and remaining items

autoRegroupWiring.signature: partitionIntoGroups() called after recalculateDAG() in state add-set flow
autoRegroupWiring.description: Auto-regroup when DAG structure changes via add-set (deferred from v6.0.0)

clearPattern.signature: renderFooter(nextCommand: string, options?: { clearRequired?: boolean }): string
clearPattern.description: Footer pattern must exist to verify UX consistency across skills

remediationFlow.description: Remediation flow must exist to audit the audit-to-set handoff UX

boundedScope.description: UX audit operates on a predefined checklist of items, not open-ended exploration. The checklist is defined before work begins.

breadcrumbConsistency.description: All error messages follow the breadcrumb pattern: what is done, what is missing, what to run next

definition.scope: Systematic UX audit: breadcrumb consistency, error message improvements, command discoverability, first-run experience polish. Wire auto-regroup after add-set. Bounded checklist, not open-ended.

tasks.description: Define UX audit checklist covering breadcrumbs, errors, discoverability, first-run
Standardize breadcrumb format across error messages
Wire partitionIntoGroups() after recalculateDAG() in add-set state flow
tasks.acceptance: Adding a set auto-regroups the DAG

tasks.description: Improve command discoverability and first-run experience
tasks.acceptance: New users can discover commands without reading full docs

tasks.description: Produce UX audit report documenting findings and fixes

acceptance: UX audit checklist complete with all items addressed
